examples.en: I feel a lot of stress at work these days.
examples.zh: 我最近工作壓力很大。

examples.en: Too much stress is bad for your health.
examples.zh: 壓力太大對健康不好。

img: person holding head at busy desk

examples.en: I didn't get enough sleep last night.
examples.zh: 我昨晚睡得不夠。

examples.en: Try to sleep at least seven hours.
examples.zh: 盡量睡至少七個小時。

img: person sleeping peacefully in bed

examples.en: I just want to relax this weekend.
examples.zh: 這週末我只想放鬆一下。

examples.en: Take a deep breath and relax.
examples.zh: 深呼吸,放鬆一下。

img: person lying on sofa with tea

examples.en: You should take a rest after lunch.
examples.zh: 你午餐後應該休息一下。

examples.en: My body really needs some rest.
examples.zh: 我的身體真的需要休息。

img: person resting on couch with eyes closed

examples.en: I'm so tired after a long day.
examples.zh: 忙了一整天,我好累。

examples.en: You look tired. Go get some sleep.
examples.zh: 你看起來很累,去睡一下吧。

img: yawning person rubbing eyes

examples.en: Stay calm and everything will be fine.
examples.zh: 保持冷靜,一切都會沒事的。

examples.en: Deep breathing helps me calm down.
examples.zh: 深呼吸幫助我冷靜下來。

img: calm person meditating by a lake

examples.en: Don't worry, we still have time.
examples.zh: 別擔心,我們還有時間。

examples.en: She worries too much about small things.
examples.zh: 她太在意小事了。

img: person biting nails looking anxious

examples.en: Doing yoga makes me happy.
examples.zh: 做瑜伽讓我很開心。

examples.en: I feel happy when I spend time with friends.
examples.zh: 和朋友相處時我很快樂。

img: smiling person outdoors in sunshine

examples.en: I try to eat healthy food every day.
examples.zh: 我每天盡量吃健康的食物。

examples.en: Walking keeps you healthy.
examples.zh: 走路能讓你保持健康。

img: fresh vegetables and running shoes

examples.en: Breathe slowly to calm yourself.
examples.zh: 慢慢呼吸讓自己冷靜。

examples.en: Just breathe and take your time.
examples.zh: 深呼吸,慢慢來。

img: person taking a deep breath by window

examples.en: Regular exercise reduces stress.
examples.zh: 規律運動能減輕壓力。

examples.en: I exercise three times a week.
examples.zh: 我一週運動三次。

img: person jogging in a park

examples.en: A smile can brighten your whole day.
examples.zh: 一個微笑能照亮你一整天。

examples.en: She smiled and said thank you.
examples.zh: 她微笑著說謝謝。

img: close-up of a warm smiling face

examples.en: A good breakfast gives me energy.
examples.zh: 吃好早餐讓我有精神。

examples.en: I have no energy after work.
examples.zh: 下班後我一點力氣都沒有。

img: energetic person stretching at sunrise

examples.en: Painting is a great hobby to relax.
examples.zh: 畫畫是很棒的放鬆嗜好。

examples.en: What hobbies do you have?
examples.zh: 你有什麼興趣嗜好?

img: person painting at a cozy table

examples.en: Let's take a walk after dinner.
examples.zh: 晚餐後我們去散個步吧。

examples.en: A short walk clears my mind.
examples.zh: 短短散步能讓我頭腦清醒。

img: person walking on a tree-lined path

examples.en: Meditation helps me start the day calmly.
examples.zh: 冥想幫助我平靜地開始一天。

examples.en: She practices meditation every morning.
examples.zh: 她每天早上練習冥想。

img: person sitting cross-legged eyes closed

examples.en: Deep breathing eases my anxiety.
examples.zh: 深呼吸能緩解我的焦慮。

examples.en: He feels anxiety before big meetings.
examples.zh: 重要會議前他會感到焦慮。

img: worried person with hands clasped

examples.en: A warm bath is pure relaxation for me.
examples.zh: 泡熱水澡對我來說是純粹的放鬆。

examples.en: Music brings me a sense of relaxation.
examples.zh: 音樂帶給我放鬆的感覺。

img: person soaking in a warm bath

examples.en: Try to be mindful when you eat.
examples.zh: 吃東西時試著專注當下。

examples.en: Being mindful keeps me from worrying.
examples.zh: 保持覺察讓我不再胡思亂想。

img: person mindfully sipping tea slowly

examples.en: The company cares about employee wellness.
examples.zh: 這家公司重視員工的身心健康。

examples.en: Good sleep is part of wellness.
examples.zh: 良好睡眠是養生的一部分。

img: spa setting with candles and plants

examples.en: A bedtime routine helps me sleep better.
examples.zh: 睡前的固定作息幫助我睡得更好。

examples.en: Exercise is part of my daily routine.
examples.zh: 運動是我每天的例行事項。

img: checklist of daily morning habits

examples.en: I try to keep a work-life balance.
examples.zh: 我努力保持工作與生活的平衡。

examples.en: It's hard to balance study and rest.
examples.zh: 很難兼顧學習和休息。

img: balanced stones stacked by water

examples.en: There's a lot of pressure before exams.
examples.zh: 考試前壓力很大。

examples.en: Don't put too much pressure on yourself.
examples.zh: 別給自己太大壓力。

img: person under heavy weight illustration

examples.en: A walk outside lifts my mood.
examples.zh: 到外面散步能提振我的心情。

examples.en: She's in a good mood today.
examples.zh: 她今天心情很好。

img: face with different emotion icons

examples.en: Try to stay positive during hard times.
examples.zh: 在艱難時刻試著保持正面。

examples.en: A positive attitude reduces stress.
examples.zh: 正面的態度能減輕壓力。

img: person giving a thumbs up smiling

examples.en: A short nap refreshes me in the afternoon.
examples.zh: 下午小睡一下讓我恢復精神。

examples.en: I took a quick nap on the couch.
examples.zh: 我在沙發上小睡了一下。

img: person napping under a blanket midday

examples.en: Stretch your body before you exercise.
examples.zh: 運動前先伸展身體。

examples.en: I stretch every morning to feel loose.
examples.zh: 我每天早上伸展讓身體放鬆。

img: person stretching arms upward

examples.en: Remember to hydrate throughout the day.
examples.zh: 記得整天都要補充水分。

examples.en: Hydrating well keeps my skin healthy.
examples.zh: 多喝水讓我的皮膚健康。

img: hand holding a glass of water

examples.en: Writing in a journal helps me relax.
examples.zh: 寫日記幫助我放鬆。

examples.en: She journals about her feelings at night.
examples.zh: 她晚上會寫日記記錄心情。

img: open notebook with a pen on desk

examples.en: I feel grateful for my health.
examples.zh: 我對自己的健康心存感激。

examples.en: Being grateful makes me happier.
examples.zh: 懷抱感恩讓我更快樂。

img: hands together in a thankful gesture

examples.en: I need a weekend to recharge.
examples.zh: 我需要一個週末來充電。

examples.en: Nature helps me recharge my energy.
examples.zh: 大自然幫助我恢復精力。

img: phone battery icon over a resting person

examples.en: I feel overwhelmed by all this work.
examples.zh: 這麼多工作讓我快喘不過氣。

examples.en: When you're overwhelmed, take a break.
examples.zh: 當你不知所措時,休息一下。

img: person buried under piles of paper

examples.en: Long hours can lead to burnout.
examples.zh: 長時間工作可能導致身心俱疲。

examples.en: She took time off to recover from burnout.
examples.zh: 她請假來從倦怠中恢復。

img: exhausted person slumped at desk

examples.en: Resilience helps you bounce back from stress.
examples.zh: 韌性幫助你從壓力中恢復。

examples.en: She showed great resilience after the loss.
examples.zh: 失去之後她展現了強大的復原力。

img: small plant growing through cracked ground

examples.en: Mindfulness teaches you to live in the moment.
examples.zh: 正念教你活在當下。

examples.en: I practice mindfulness to reduce anxiety.
examples.zh: 我練習正念來減輕焦慮。

img: person focusing on a single candle flame

examples.en: Stress often causes insomnia.
examples.zh: 壓力常常導致失眠。

examples.en: He struggles with insomnia every night.
examples.zh: 他每晚都受失眠所苦。

img: person awake staring at ceiling clock

examples.en: Exercise helps me cope with stress.
examples.zh: 運動幫助我調適壓力。

examples.en: She learned to cope with pressure at work.
examples.zh: 她學會了應付工作上的壓力。

img: person calmly handling many tasks

examples.en: Sleep is important for your wellbeing.
examples.zh: 睡眠對你的身心安康很重要。

examples.en: Mental wellbeing matters as much as physical health.
examples.zh: 心理健康和身體健康一樣重要。

img: person relaxing peacefully in nature

examples.en: Rest is key to a full recovery.
examples.zh: 休息是完全復原的關鍵。

examples.en: Recovery takes both time and patience.
examples.zh: 恢復需要時間和耐心。

img: person stretching gently after rest

examples.en: I like to unwind with a book at night.
examples.zh: 我喜歡晚上看書放鬆。

examples.en: It takes me a while to unwind after work.
examples.zh: 下班後我需要一段時間才能放鬆。

img: person reading on a comfy armchair

examples.en: Soft music soothes my nerves.
examples.zh: 輕柔的音樂能舒緩我的緊張。

examples.en: A warm drink soothes me before bed.
examples.zh: 睡前一杯熱飲能安撫我。

img: warm cup of tea with steam rising

examples.en: I feel tension in my shoulders after work.
examples.zh: 下班後我的肩膀很緊繃。

examples.en: Stretching releases the tension in my body.
examples.zh: 伸展能釋放身體的緊繃。

img: person rubbing tense shoulders

examples.en: Poor sleep leads to constant fatigue.
examples.zh: 睡眠不足會導致持續的疲勞。

examples.en: I felt deep fatigue after the busy week.
examples.zh: 忙碌的一週後我感到深深的疲憊。

img: drained person leaning against wall

examples.en: Good food nourishes both body and mind.
examples.zh: 好的食物滋養身心。

examples.en: Kind words nourish the soul.
examples.zh: 善意的話語滋養心靈。

img: colorful nourishing bowl of healthy food

examples.en: I find serenity in quiet mornings.
examples.zh: 我在寧靜的早晨找到安詳。

examples.en: The garden gives me a sense of serenity.
examples.zh: 這座花園帶給我一種寧靜感。

img: still lake at peaceful sunrise

examples.en: Decluttering my room clears my mind.
examples.zh: 整理房間讓我頭腦清爽。

examples.en: I declutter my desk every Friday.
examples.zh: 我每週五整理我的書桌。

img: tidy minimalist desk after cleaning

examples.en: Taking a day off is a form of self-care.
examples.zh: 請一天假是一種自我照顧。

examples.en: Self-care isn't selfish; it's necessary.
examples.zh: 自我關懷不是自私,而是必要的。

img: person enjoying a quiet spa moment

examples.en: Setting boundaries protects my mental health.
examples.zh: 設立界線保護我的心理健康。

examples.en: It's okay to set boundaries with others.
examples.zh: 和他人設立界線是沒問題的。

img: person calmly saying no with a gesture

examples.en: Keeping a gratitude list lifts my mood.
examples.zh: 寫感恩清單能提振我的心情。

examples.en: Gratitude helps me focus on the good.
examples.zh: 感恩幫助我專注在美好的事物上。

img: journal page listing things to be thankful for

examples.en: A cold shower refreshes me in the morning.
examples.zh: 早上沖個冷水澡讓我神清氣爽。

examples.en: A short break refreshes my mind.
examples.zh: 短暫休息讓我頭腦清新。

img: person splashing water on a fresh face
